recentTweets.text: RT @HouseDemocrats: John Lewis was more than our esteemed friend and colleague, he was a force to be reckoned with and a powerful civil rig…

While war continues in Iran and prices soar at every level, President Trump is readying to steal your democracy.

Don't let him.
Profits for him and his billionaire friends, higher prices for you.
This is extremely irresponsible and dangerous language from the Trump Administration's top immigration official.

Air Quality Alert: Smoke from Canadian Wildfires is expected to impact air quality in Connecticut today.

CT residents are advised to limit their time outdoors. Those who must be outside should take necessary precautions. https://t.co/iYqfjF9Nag

RT @GovNedLamont: ⚠️ AIR QUALITY ALERT ⚠️

Canadian wildfire smoke is expected to impact CT’s air quality today.

Limit time outdoors, move…

President Trump & Stephen Miller were the architects behind the zero tolerance family separation policy during the first Trump administration.

They are intent on continuing this inhumane policy, just in a new form.
https://t.co/NZfTNiAYhJ

We cannot allow this. I'm demanding answers & will seek a full accounting of every child still needlessly detained.

The administration must reunite these children with their families without delay.

President Trump promised his immigration enforcement agenda would target violent criminals. Instead, a five-year-old child, and dozens more like her, was detained and given only one hour a week to visit with her mother. This lasted 118 days. (1/3)

https://t.co/NZfTNiAYhJ

It was not because she didn't have a parent, it wasn't because she broke some law—she is five.

It was deliberate cruelty, as the Trump administration prioritizes detention & deportation quotas over basic decency & due process. This is child abuse. (2/3) https://t.co/3i2JuCVbNC
The result is now dozens of traumatized children in Connecticut, possibly hundreds, with thousands more spread nationwide across this failed system. (3/3)

Millions of dollars in federal funding will bolster CT’s quantum initiative.

CT is quickly becoming a nationwide leader in the field & I’m proud to have advocated for this funding which will spur economic development, create good paying jobs & boost cutting-edge research in CT.
RT @HouseDemocrats: Children are going hungry so Trump’s billionaire buddies can get a tax break.
RT @rosadelauro: We all know the Trump Administration is full of shit—now they want you to be, too. https://t.co/wziqFB7fPV

Governor Ned Lamont has activated Connecticut's Extreme Hot Weather Protocol through Thursday as dangerous heat is expected across the state.

Please take precautions during this heat and if you are in need of a place to cool down call 211 or go to https://t.co/2GuJqmh3P1.

RT @atrupar: DeLAURO: Has SBA conducted a study of if small businesses are struggling to access tariff refunds compared to larger firms?

L…

Exactly, it's not just about the parasite. The parasite is just one symptom of this Administration dismantling agencies and systems meant to protect Americans from this exact scenario. 

Outbreaks like this, and possibly worse, will happen again and again until we change course.

In the past week, two more people have been shot and killed by ICE officers, with no body camera footage. Grieving families and a concerned public deserve answers.

ICE must not get another dime until reforms. This unaccountable violence must end.
We all know the Trump Administration is full of shit—now they want you to be, too. https://t.co/wziqFB7fPV

So the new pool paint job failed, $16 million of your taxpayer dollars literally down the drain.

Meanwhile, your energy, groceries, and gas bills are going up.

For the first time since 2019, the United States Supreme Court will appear before the House Appropriations Committee to discuss its budget.
 
Tune in today at 10 AM: https://t.co/2V02ku3EWq

America's working families are struggling under Trump's affordability crisis. His solution? War in Iran and tax cuts for the wealthy elite.

I'm fighting to bring down costs and make life more affordable—not more wars and giveaways to the rich.

On Accessible Parking Awareness Day, we are reminded that accessible parking provides those with disabilities safe access to public spaces, independence, & dignity.

I’ll continue to work with advocates, like my friends at Peace Love & ACCESSibility, for a more inclusive society. https://t.co/BWBfC9CKNZ

I joined @LEAPforkids for their annual Read-In on the Green– an event that inspires a love of reading in our children.

LEAP has made a real difference in the lives of New Haven’s children, helping them to develop a strong foundation, & I am proud to support their cause. https://t.co/iF8h7bAdmy

When: 6:00 PM
Where: https://t.co/YzMnLQUBeE
How: call (855) 920-0553 to participate

See you soon! https://t.co/ljfHNvYb2Q

Supreme Court justices have a duty, just as cabinet secretaries and agency heads, to answer our questions and provide information to the American people relevant to their budget requests.

I look forward to Justice Elena Kagan’s and Justice Amy Coney Barrett’s testimony.
My full statement: https://t.co/RXpb8mOAkX

His inaction will only prolong conflict in the region, further threatening the lives of American service members & innocent civilians while keeping costs high because of an unending war that no one asked for. It must end. President Trump is responsible for bringing this conflict

This is a mess of President Trump’s own making. Instead of showing leadership and working hard to end the conflict that he created himself, he is now seemingly throwing up his hands and giving up. (3/4)

There was no reason this war should have started. While Americans struggled with the high cost of groceries, rent & other basics, President Trump launched a war of choice with no clear goals & no off-ramp to ending the conflict. (1/4)

Instead of focusing on lowering the costs, he is filling his pockets and telling hardworking Americans to cut corners on spending. https://t.co/xeAb5TvmnB

Trump now has plans to remake the East Potomac Golf Course.

While millions of Americans are living paycheck to paycheck, he's teeing up to build himself yet another playground. These should not be the priorities of our President. https://t.co/eIOExbH1mz
RT @HQNewsNow: https://t.co/v4fgb3W2uN

If you rely on medical equipment or have an emergency, call 9-1-1. Stay safe and look out for updates. Call 2-1-1 for other services.

Today we remember our founding, built on the principles of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. As we continue working to form a more perfect union, we must use our past struggles to guide us in moving forward. https://t.co/DsLhYKQlak

That’s how much Trump PROFITED in crypto-related income during his Presidency. All while American families struggle to afford groceries for this Fourth of July weekend.

This ruling should never have been so close.
